beats.headline: Where new languages are formed.
beats.body: Slang, sound, and syntax the mainstream hasn't caught up to yet.

beats.headline: Where new aesthetics are tested.
beats.body: Looks and worlds tried on in public, long before they trend.

beats.headline: Where new truths are spoken.
beats.body: The things people actually mean, said out loud without translation.

lede: Mainstream or niche, a space to be seen, understood, and valued.
uniteHeading: Who are we building for?

types.title: The Curious
types.question: Do you ask why and how, more than what?

types.title: The Expressive
types.question: Do you use music, fashion and memes to introduce yourself?

types.title: The Culturally Fluid
types.question: Do you live with contradictions — and are OK with it?

types.title: The (Mis)fit
types.question: For every square hole, round peg. Are you tired of one-size-fits-all narratives?
